rule: mode across seeds, tie-break by count then proximity to median

provenance.residual_conditions: skeptic_residual, contrarian_residual, collaborator_residual locked from single-seed (42) tune run in best_coefs_tune.json. The other 11 conditions are the 5-seed mode-across-seeds aggregate. Residuals were added to the pipeline post-hoc after the multi-seed tune had completed.
